case_title: PHILIP OLIVER BEWLEY VS. PORTIA BELL

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BELL, PORTIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEWLEY, PHILIP OLIVER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, PORTIA $99.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $159.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
